summary: Completed testing for Steam Game Library iteration 3. All 12 features tested successfully. Fixed a backend bug where roles field was missing for users without roles in /api/discover/users and /api/users/search endpoints. 14/14 backend tests pass, all frontend tests pass.

minor.issue: Roles field was not being returned for users who didn't have roles set in the database (legacy users before roles feature)
minor.fix_applied: Added u['roles'] = u.get('roles', []) to ensure roles is always returned as empty array when not present

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns ok with steam_key_configured=true
BACKEND: GET /api/discover/collections returns array of public collections with games and owner info
BACKEND: GET /api/discover/users returns array of public users with game_count, follower_count, and roles field
BACKEND: GET /api/followers/{user_id} returns followers and following lists with user details
BACKEND: GET /api/games endpoint with sort_by parameter correctly requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/users/search?q=test returns users with roles field, game_count, and follower_count
BACKEND: 404 returned for nonexistent user on /api/followers endpoint
FRONTEND: Homepage loads with Navbar showing Library, Discover, Users links
FRONTEND: Discover page (/discover) loads with Collections and Users tabs, shows public collections with role badges
FRONTEND: User Search page (/users) shows role badges (Creator badge visible) and follower counts in search results
FRONTEND: Collection cards on /collections page are directly clickable (onClick navigate, no separate View button)
FRONTEND: Profile page (/profile/{userId}) shows clickable followers count that links to /profile/{userId}/followers
FRONTEND: Followers page (/profile/{userId}/followers) loads with Followers and Following tabs with counts
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in ProfilePage.js: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency 'currentUser' - should add to dependency array or use useCallback
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing users and collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 3 are working. Backend endpoints /api/discover/collections, /api/discover/users, /api/followers/{user_id} are public and don't require authentication. The games sorting endpoint /api/games requires authentication. Role badges (Creator, Admin, etc.) display correctly throughout the app. The NONAME user has Creator role, Phaeton W12 user has no roles (empty array). There is 1 public collection named 'BOAT' with 7 games.

changes_made.backend/server.py: Added u['roles'] = u.get('roles', []) in discover_users and search_users endpoints to ensure roles field is always present in response
